key_learnings: Deep understanding of how genetic variants influence nutrient metabolism, absorption, and dietary requirements. Mastered gene-diet interactions including MTHFR, APOE, and FTO polymorphisms.
research_findings: Identified specific gene-nutrient interactions linking SNPs to vitamin D metabolism, folate processing, omega-3 response, and caffeine sensitivity. Documented population-level nutrigenomics patterns.
current_focus_areas: Advanced nutrient metabolomics, personalized nutrition protocols based on genetic profiles, and integration of pharmacogenomics with dietary guidance.
learning_log: 2026-05-01: Progress updated to 95%. Completed advanced gene-nutrient interaction mapping.
